title: SkyblockAddition
description: SkyblockAddition is a lightweight resource pack for the hypixel skyblock. It replaces only the most used/useful items. This pack works like an addon, just put it on top of your favorite pack!
body:
SkyblockAddition uses CITs (_Custom Item Textures_), so it **only works with optifine** or any other mod that lets you use CITs.

The pack deliberately contains few textures (only the most useful ones) because the idea is to keep the pack lightweight and have a compromise between performance and comfort

In order to make the pack work you will need :

**Optifine :** for 1.8.9

**Firmament :** for 1.21.5+

*Note that the pack won't work if you don't install the required mods*

Enjoy !
